title: Duration in hours instead of days for Gantt view
excerpt: Very new to Monday.  Is there a way to make the duration column set to hours instead of days?  I need to see a Gantt chart that shows tasks by hour of deadline through the day.  I have many tasks that need to complete on…

posts.author: ckr0ckr0 (Cynthia)
posts.cookedHtml: Very new to Monday. Is there a way to make the duration column set to hours instead of days? I need to see a Gantt chart that shows tasks by hour of deadline through the day. I have many tasks that need to complete on the same day. One might complete at 9 am; 1 at 10 am; 1 at 3 pm. I need to see those various tasks in an hour view on my Gantt chart. Does this functionality currently exist? If so, how do I do it?

posts.author: REP (Rémi Epron)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
i have exactly the same requirement, but no solution yet.
I’ll keep an eye on the topic
kind regards,
Remi

posts.author: ckr0ckr0 (Cynthia)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank u! It would be very helpful to have this added. Glad to see others want it too!

posts.author: alex.martin (Alex Martin)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here, trying to sequence a number of tasks within a given day and use dependencies to estimate when it would all be completed but need a more granular view.

posts.author: ByronGriffin (ByronGriffin)
posts.cookedHtml: The hourly view functionality in the Gantt Chart on Monday.com is not available at this time. The duration column can only be days, not hours. However, you can use a time column to specify a specific time for a task to complete. Your request for the ability to view tasks hourly on a Gantt chart may be sent to platform support as a suggestion for future updates.

posts.author: Jayz (Jay Bouvier)
posts.cookedHtml: I am also looking for this functionnality to use: The duration column to be viewed in hours in a Gantt chart.

posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml: i add the request to have hourly view. Daily or weekly isnt detailed enough for our project/event planning
